title: SAP B1/Business One Lead
description:
• Stable work environment
  • Newly created role
  • Solution Architecture & Pre-Sales Ownership

about the company
My client is looking for a high-energy SAP Lead (B1 / Business One). While the team has a strong technical engine of consultants, we need someone who can bridge the gap between sales and delivery by crafting winning proposals (RFI/RFPs) and pitching sophisticated solutions to potential clients.

about the job

  • Partner with Sales to attend client meetings, acting as the subject matter expert who transforms business pain points into SAP B1 solutions.
  • Take full accountability for the creation of RFI/RFP responses, technical quotations, and project estimates—ensuring every document is professional and persuasive.
  • Design and deliver high-impact product demonstrations and Proof of Concepts (PoC) that clearly articulate business value.
  • Lead and mentor our team of technical and functional consultants, ensuring they meet delivery standards and project timelines.
  • Oversee project lifecycles from initial blueprinting to go-live, acting as the primary escalation point for the client to ensure satisfaction and budget adherence.
  • Provide management with accurate sales forecasting, revenue recognition data, and account updates.

skills and experience required
Solid functional background in SAP B1 modules but prefer the strategic "front-end" of the business over back-end coding.

5–8 years of experience in the SAP B1 ecosystem and comfortable leading workshops and influencing stakeholders at all levels with clarity and confidence.

Proven track record in solution consulting, pre-sales, or project management within ERP environments.

whats an offer
This is a permanent role for a SAP Lead (B1 / Business One) will pay a salary range of $ 7,000 to $ 9,000 plus perks from the company.

To apply online please use the 'apply' function, alternatively you can reach me at https://www.linkedin.com/in/Oliviatoh-032330132/. (EA: 94C3609 / R22109942)

postedCompany.description:
Randstad is a global talent leader with the vision to be the world’s most equitable and specialised talent company. As a partner for talent and through our four specialisations - Operational, Professional, Digital and Enterprise - we provide clients with the high-quality, diverse and agile workforces that they need to succeed in a talent scarce world. We help people secure meaningful roles, develop relevant skills and find purpose and belonging in their workplace. Through the value we create, we are committed to a better and more sustainable future for all.

In Singapore, we provide specialised professional recruitment and employer branding consultation services to companies in these industries and functions:

Accounting & Finance
Banking & Financial Services
Construction & Property
Corporate & Secretarial Support
Engineering
Human Resources
Information Technology
Legal
Life Science
Sales, Marketing and Communications
Supply Chain & Procurement

For more information, please visit www.randstad.com.sg.
postedCompany.name: RANDSTAD PTE. LIMITED

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
